senses.gloss: to pour abundantly or flow forth vehemently and in consecutive quantities (upon)
to flog, to inflict whips on
to be fat to the utmost degree (said of bovids)
dates or in particular dates that are dry in such a manner that they dissolve well in the mouth

etymology.text: Unknown. Perhaps borrowed from Iranian. Compare Old Armenian ազոխ (azox, “unripe grapes”), Persian ازخ (azox, “rotten and empty nut”).
